visual_summary: A colorful button component with a bold design, suitable for a call-to-action (CTA) in a marketing or promotional page, often used to draw user attention.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: Rainbow Button Demo
Description: A colorful button component with a bold design, suitable for a call-to-action (CTA) in a marketing or promotional page, often used to draw user attention.
Style: glassmorphism, bold
Interactions: clickable, animated
Tags: button, cta, marketing

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
import { RainbowButton } from "@/registry/magicui/rainbow-button"

export default function RainbowButtonDemo() {
  return <RainbowButton>Get Unlimited Access</RainbowButton>
}
